mapper.select: SELECT id, type, goal_id, sender_id, receiver_id, payload::text AS payload, invitation_status, read_at, date, url, created_at, NULL AS sender_display_name, NULL AS goal_title FROM goal_notifications WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT n.id, n.type, n.goal_id, n.sender_id, n.receiver_id, n.payload::text AS payload, n.invitation_status, n.read_at, n.date, n.url, n.created_at, s.display_name AS sender_display_name, g.title AS goal_title FROM goal_notifications n LEFT JOIN users s ON s.id = n.sender_id LEFT JOIN goals g ON g.id = n.goal_id WHERE n.receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND n.read_at IS NULL ORDER BY n.created_at DESC LIMIT 100
